app.name: Senso4s
app.description: Never run out of gas again.

connection_interval_minutes.label: Connection Interval
connection_interval_minutes.hint: Minutes between short active BLE connections for direct characteristic reads. Advertisement updates are still used between connections.

gas_capacity_kg.label: Gas Capacity
gas_capacity_kg.hint: Cylinder gas capacity used to calculate remaining gas weight from the advertised percentage.

low_level_threshold.label: Low Gas Threshold
low_level_threshold.hint: Tank empty alarm turns on when gas level is at or below this percentage.
